---
title: Repository Guide
description: The base AGENTS.md template for any repo.
---

Use this when you want one portable instruction file that Codex, Claude Code, OpenClaw, and other agents can share.

## Install

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rogerchappel/agentic-team-playbook/main/templates/AGENTS.md -o AGENTS.md
```

## Customise

Edit:

- purpose
- repository type
- layout
- install/test/lint/typecheck/build commands
- stop-before-touching list
- verification expectations

## Source

The template lives in [`templates/AGENTS.md`](https://github.com/rogerchappel/agentic-team-playbook/blob/main/templates/AGENTS.md).
